case_title: ADAM A DIAZ VS. MATIE NATOV

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ADAM A DAIZ. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MATIE NATOV. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 THE COURT DENIES YOUR REQUEST BECAUSE THE INFORMATION PROVIDED ON THE REQUEST SHOWS THAT YOU ARE NOT ELIGIBLE FOR THE FEE WAIVER YOU REQUESTED. AS TO PLAINTIFF DIAZ, ADAM A
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT NATOV, MATIE
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
